title: hoya baguioensis subsp. hernaezii
intro: Hoya baguioensis subsp. hernaezii is a rare and lesser-known subspecies of the Hoya plant family, native to the Philippines. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to produce alkaloids that have been traditionally used to treat various health issues. The extracts from Hoya baguioensis subsp. hernaezii have been found to possess anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial properties, which can help alleviate symptoms of fever, sore throat, and respiratory infections, as well as promote wound healing and skin health. Herbal preparations of Hoya baguioensis subsp. hernaezii, such as infusions and decoctions, have been used in traditional medicine to treat various ailments, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
